items.label: About
items.content:
# ZYNQ.peer
Lightweight WebRTC wrapper (PeerJS).

## Features
- P2P messaging (1-1 + broadcast)
- Audio/video calls
- Invite/accept flow
- Heartbeat + timeout
- Auto stream management
- Bitrate stats
- Event-driven API
- No backend

items.label: Quick Start
items.content:
# Quick Start

## Init
```js
import 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@0.2.5/index.min.js'
await ZYNQ.load('peer')
await ZYNQ.peer.start()
```

## ID
```js
ZYNQ.peer.on('ready', id => console.log(id))
```

## Connect
```js
await ZYNQ.peer.connect('peer-id')
```

## Send
```js
ZYNQ.peer.sendTo('peer-id', 'Hello')
```

## Receive
```js
ZYNQ.peer.on('message', ({ peerId, message }) => {})
```

items.label: Start
items.content:
```js
await ZYNQ.peer.start(id?)
```
- optional custom id
- emits `ready`

items.label: Destroy
items.content:
```js
ZYNQ.peer.destroy()
```
- closes all
- stops media
- emits `destroyed`

items.label: All Events
items.content:
# Events
```js
ZYNQ.peer.on(event, cb)
```

| Event | Data |
|------|------|
| ready | id |
| invite | {id, config, accept, reject} |
| joined | peerId |
| left | peerId |
| message | {peerId, message} |
| local-stream | MediaStream |
| remote-stream | {peerId, stream} |
| bitrate | {peerId, kbps} |
| rejected | peerId |
| error | {code, peerId?, message} |
| destroyed | - |

## Notes
- `invite` â†’ accept()/reject()
- `remote-stream` â†’ video/audio
- `bitrate` ~2s interval

items.label: Messaging
items.content:
# Messaging

## Send
```js
ZYNQ.peer.sendTo(id, msg)
```

## Broadcast
```js
ZYNQ.peer.broadcast(msg)
```

## Receive
```js
ZYNQ.peer.on('message', ({peerId, message}) => {})
```

items.label: Calls
items.content:
# Media

## Connect
```js
await ZYNQ.peer.connect(id, {
  video: true,
  audio: true,
  resolution: 720,
  fps: 30
})
```

## Streams
```js
ZYNQ.peer.on('local-stream', s => local.srcObject = s)
ZYNQ.peer.on('remote-stream', ({stream}) => remote.srcObject = stream)
```

items.label: Manage
items.content:
# Connections

## Disconnect
```js
ZYNQ.peer.disconnect(id)
```

## My ID
```js
ZYNQ.peer.getMyId()
```

## Active
```js
ZYNQ.peer.getActivePeers()
```

items.label: System
items.content:
# System
- heartbeat: 2s
- timeout: 12s
- auto stream reuse
- bitrate only w/ video

## Debug
```js
ZYNQ.peer.setDebug(2)
```

## AutoStart
```js
ZYNQ.peer.setAutoStart(false)
```
